config.draft_mode_note: Measured on legacy JSON draft path with draft/verify/repair loops (pre-NAR+OPS default in production path after commit e7b03dd).

steps.label: opening
steps.narration_preview: The Mosswake Gate is a crossroads where the road stretches into the wild, and the air is thick with the scent of damp stone and smoke...

steps.label: turn_1
steps.fallback_reason: Model JSON did not include usable narration text.
steps.action: I scan the gate square carefully, note guards and exits, and ask a nearby merchant what trouble has been happening lately.

steps.label: turn_2
steps.action: I thank them, buy a cheap travel ration if available, and walk toward the most suspicious alley while staying alert.

steps.label: turn_3
steps.action: I keep my hand near my satchel, listen at the alley mouth for a moment, then step in only as far as I can still retreat.

coherence_notes: Opening and turns 2–3 produced coherent Mosswake Gate frontier prose.
Turn 1 used deterministic fallback after missing narration in model JSON.
All observed turns remained at Mosswake Gate (player did not leave).

notes: Wall time is dominated by multiple LLM calls per turn, not SQLite apply.
Re-run metrics after enabling AI_RPG_DRAFT_MODE=dsl / fewer verify loops to update published numbers.
